creator: christer.edwards@gmail.com
text:
maintainer update : sysutils/py-salt

This release changes the versioning scheme to a year.month.x, in this case 2014.1.0.
Upstream is also now bundling sysutils/py-salt-cloud with sysutils/py-salt, so that port can be removed / updated in MOVED.

I added PORTEPOCH in this release. Not sure if it's needed or not with the versioning scheme update.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
